_comment: Pelican Panel Egg for Surya Discord Matchmaking Bot
name: Surya Discord Bot (TypeScript)
author: admin@example.com
description: Discord.js v14 TypeScript bot for matchmaking and game room management. Automatically builds TypeScript to JavaScript and runs the compiled code.
startup: if [[ -d .git ]] && [[ {{AUTO_UPDATE}} == "1" ]]; then git pull; fi; echo 'Building TypeScript...'; npm run build; echo 'Starting bot...'; npm run start

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Surya Discord Bot Installation Script
#
# Server Files: /mnt/server
apt update
apt install -y git curl jq file unzip make gcc g++ python3 python3-dev libtool

echo -e "Updating npm to latest version..."
npm install npm@latest --location=global

mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server

if [ "${USER_UPLOAD}" == "true" ] || [ "${USER_UPLOAD}" == "1" ]; then
    echo -e "User upload mode - skipping git clone"
    exit 0
fi

## Add git ending if it's not on the address
if [[ ${GIT_ADDRESS} != *.git ]]; then
    GIT_ADDRESS=${GIT_ADDRESS}.git
fi

if [ -z "${USERNAME}" ] && [ -z "${ACCESS_TOKEN}" ]; then
    echo -e "Using anonymous git clone"
else
    GIT_ADDRESS="https://${USERNAME}:${ACCESS_TOKEN}@$(echo -e ${GIT_ADDRESS} | cut -d/ -f3-)"
fi

## Pull git repo
if [ "$(ls -A /mnt/server)" ]; then
    echo -e "/mnt/server directory is not empty."
    if [ -d .git ]; then
        echo -e ".git directory exists"
        if [ -f .git/config ]; then
            echo -e "Loading info from git config"
            ORIGIN=$(git config --get remote.origin.url)
        else
            echo -e "Files found with no git config"
            echo -e "Exiting to avoid breaking existing files"
            exit 10
        fi
    fi

    if [ "${ORIGIN}" == "${GIT_ADDRESS}" ]; then
        echo "Pulling latest from git repository"
        git pull
    fi
else
    echo -e "/mnt/server is empty.\nCloning repository..."
    if [ -z ${BRANCH} ]; then
        echo -e "Cloning default branch"
        git clone ${GIT_ADDRESS} .
    else
        echo -e "Cloning branch: ${BRANCH}"
        git clone --single-branch --branch ${BRANCH} ${GIT_ADDRESS} .
    fi
fi

echo "Installing Node.js dependencies..."
if [ -f /mnt/server/package.json ]; then
    /usr/local/bin/npm install
else
    echo "ERROR: package.json not found!"
    exit 1
fi

echo "Building TypeScript project..."
if [ -f /mnt/server/tsconfig.json ]; then
    /usr/local/bin/npm run build
    if [ $? -eq 0 ]; then
        echo "TypeScript build successful!"
    else
        echo "ERROR: TypeScript build failed!"
        exit 1
    fi
else
    echo "WARNING: tsconfig.json not found, skipping build"
fi

echo "Checking for .env file..."
if [ ! -f /mnt/server/.env ]; then
    echo "WARNING: .env file not found!"
    echo "Creating .env template from .env.example..."
    if [ -f /mnt/server/.env.example ]; then
        cp /mnt/server/.env.example /mnt/server/.env
        echo "Please configure your .env file with Discord bot token and settings!"
    else
        echo "ERROR: .env.example not found. You need to create .env manually!"
    fi
fi

echo -e "Installation complete!"
echo -e "IMPORTANT: Make sure to configure your .env file before starting the bot!"
exit 0

variables.name: Git Repo Address
variables.description:
GitHub repository URL for the Surya bot.
Example: https://github.com/yourusername/Surya-Bot

variables.name: Install Branch
variables.description: Git branch to install (leave empty for default branch, usually 'main' or 'master')

variables.name: Git Access Token
variables.description:
Personal Access Token for private repositories (optional).
Create at: https://github.com/settings/tokens

variables.name: Auto Update
variables.description:
Automatically pull latest changes from git on startup.
0 = disabled, 1 = enabled

variables.name: User Uploaded Files
variables.description:
Skip git clone if you manually upload files.
0 = use git (default), 1 = manual upload
